summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI2Lean multi-formation platform iteration 2. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI tested successfully with proper branding, formation switching, and role-based access control.

ui_bugs.issue: Exercise navigation link intermittently not clickable due to overlay interception
ui_bugs.details: Navigation works but sometimes requires force clicks due to HTML overlay. Not blocking core functionality.

passed_tests: Backend API authentication for all user types (admin, formateur, BTS/AIS students)
Formation-specific exercises and categories (BTS vs Bachelor AIS)
Formation filtering for users, exercises, and statistics
Student formation-aware access (BTS sees BTS exercises, AIS sees AIS exercises)
Admin dashboard showing both formations with stats
User management with formation column and filtering
Exercise creation with formation selector and category updates
Role-based access control and dashboard routing
Logout functionality across all user types
